prompt: Create a high-resolution VFX fire effect asset: a wide horizontal wall of intense flames rising from the bottom edge across the full width of the frame, on a pure black background. The fire should have bright yellow-white cores, saturated orange and red outer tongues, and semi-transparent smoky heat wisps fading upward into darkness. Use tall varied flame peaks with uneven curling shapes, including several large twisting flame columns at the left, center, and right, plus a dense low band of smaller flames along the base. Add many glowing ember particles and sparks drifting upward, with tiny red-orange specks scattered above the flames. Make it look like a realistic cinematic game effect or compositing element, high contrast, sharp detail, natural turbulent motion implied, no objects, no text, no people, no border, centered composition, pure black, yellow white orange red, 16:9 wide landscape.
